name: sd_b3_ortwin_lazy
drl:
rule "RJ"
when
    ( not LK(f0 == 7) )
    or
    ( not LK(f0 == 7) )
then
    insertLogical(new LK(7));
end
_finding: FAMILY-II BOUNDARY (uncertifiable): the bare LAZY or-twin self-justifier RUNS AWAY in Drools (fire-limit 3/3) — the fz_42_946 mechanism in miniature; no-loop is what makes it terminate (sd_b4). Engine terminates at 2 firings (strictly better). Routes to xfail as a runaway witness at graduation; kept here as the terminate/runaway boundary control.
